top_signals.title: Nikkon weighs going private; Bain Capital, Blackstone and others likely to bid
top_signals.summary: The logistics company has selected financial advisers for the privatization process and set up a committee of outside directors to consider the matter, sources have said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
